sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103583" key="tetraxi/twn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τετρᾰχίτων</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ωνος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n103583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">having four coats</tr_>, of arteries, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> Lond.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">28.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
